data.name: Allow User Adjust Nickname
data.value: Allow User Adjust Nickname

data.name: Allow users to adjust their nickname in the profile management page.
data.value: Allow users to adjust their nickname in the profile management page.

data.name: Bearer token for the Embedding Endpoint. Falls back to OpenAI API Token when empty.
data.value: Bearer token for the Embedding Endpoint. Falls back to OpenAI API Token when empty.

data.name: Bearer token for the OpenAI Chat Endpoint, e.g. sk-abc123. Leave empty if the endpoint does not require authentication.
data.value: Bearer token for the OpenAI Chat Endpoint, e.g. sk-abc123. Leave empty if the endpoint does not require authentication.

data.name: Brand Home URL
data.value: Brand Home URL

data.name: Brand Name
data.value: Brand Name

data.name: Comma-separated BCP-47 language codes to translate blog posts into, e.g. en-US,ja-JP,ko-KR,fr-FR. Leave empty to disable AI translation.
data.value: Comma-separated BCP-47 language codes to translate blog posts into, e.g. en-US,ja-JP,ko-KR,fr-FR. Leave empty to disable AI translation.

data.name: Company Address
data.value: Company Address

data.name: Company Email
data.value: Company Email

data.name: Company Phone
data.value: Company Phone

data.name: Company Postcode
data.value: Company Postcode

data.name: Contract Logo
data.value: Contract Logo

data.name: Embedding API Token
data.value: Embedding API Token

data.name: Embedding Endpoint
data.value: Embedding Endpoint

data.name: Embedding Model
data.value: Embedding Model

data.name: Embedding model name for vector search, e.g. bge-m3:latest. Must be available at the Embedding Endpoint.
data.value: Name of the embedding model for vector search, e.g. bge-m3:latest. Must be available at the Embedding Endpoint.

data.name: Embedding Query Cache Limit
data.value: Embedding Query Cache Limit

data.name: Enable Embedding-Based Search
data.value: Enable Embedding-Based Search

data.name: ICP Number
data.value: ICP Number

data.name: LLM model name used for translating blog posts, e.g. qwen3:32b or gpt-4o. Must be available at the OpenAI Chat Endpoint above.
data.value: LLM model name used for translating blog posts, e.g. qwen3:32b or gpt-4o. Must be available at the OpenAI Chat Endpoint above.

data.name: Localization Languages
data.value: Localization Languages

data.name: Localization Model
data.value: Localization Model

data.name: Master switch for semantic (vector-based) post search. When enabled and the embedding model is configured, search uses cosine similarity. Falls back silently to keyword search when disabled or not configured.
data.value: Master switch for semantic (vector-based) post search. When enabled and the embedding model is configured, search uses cosine similarity. Falls back silently to keyword search when disabled or not configured.

data.name: Maximum number of cached search-query embeddings stored in the database (LRU). Default 2000.
data.value: Maximum number of cached search-query embeddings stored in the database (LRU). Default 2000.

data.name: Ollama API base URL for generating document and query embeddings (vector search). Only the host is used — /api/embed is appended automatically. Falls back to OpenAI Chat Endpoint when empty. E.g. https://ollama.example.com
data.value: Ollama API base URL for generating document and query embeddings (vector search). Only the host is used — /api/embed is appended automatically. Falls back to OpenAI Chat Endpoint when empty. E.g. https://ollama.example.com

data.name: OpenAI API Token
data.value: OpenAI API Token

data.name: OpenAI Chat Endpoint
data.value: OpenAI Chat Endpoint

data.name: OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint used for post translation. E.g. https://ollama.example.com/v1/chat/completions. Leave empty to disable AI translation.
data.value: OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint used for post translation. E.g. https://ollama.example.com/v1/chat/completions. Leave empty to disable AI translation.

data.name: Project Logo
data.value: Project Logo

data.name: Project Name
data.value: Project Name

data.name: Show Contract Header
data.value: Show Contract Header

data.name: The address of the company or project.
data.value: The address of the company or project.

data.name: The brand name of the company or project. E.g. Aiursoft.
data.value: The brand name of the company or project. E.g. Aiursoft.

data.name: The email address of the company or project.
data.value: The email address of the company or project.

data.name: The ICP license number for China mainland users. Leave empty to hide.
data.value: The ICP licence number for China mainland users. Leave empty to hide.

data.name: The logo of the contract displayed in the header. Support jpg, png, svg. Separate from system logo.
data.value: The contract logo displayed in the header. Supports jpg, png, svg. Separate from the system logo.

data.name: The logo of the project displayed in the navbar and footer. Support jpg, png, svg.
data.value: The logo of the project displayed in the navbar and footer. Supports jpg, png, svg.

data.name: The name of the project displayed in the frontend.
data.value: The name of the project displayed in the frontend.

data.name: The phone number of the company or project.
data.value: The phone number of the company or project.

data.name: The postcode of the company or project.
data.value: The postcode of the company or project.

data.name: The URL of the company or project. E.g. https://www.aiursoft.com
data.value: The URL of the company or project. E.g. https://www.aiursoft.com

data.name: Whether to show the contract header (Logo, address, etc.) in the contract view.
data.value: Whether to show the contract header (Logo, address, etc.) in the contract view.
